warehouseQuery.query:
select * 
from gpdip_cdm.subject_v WHERE (SUBJ_STATUS NOT IN ('DELETED')
OR SUBJ_STATUS IS NULL)
AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N'

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_RACE), '')), LOWER('Choose One'))) THEN 'Not Reported' WHEN (SUBJ_RACE IN ('Naitve Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander', 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander')) THEN 'Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander' WHEN ((SUBJ_RACE IS NULL) OR (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_RACE), '')), LOWER('Not Reported')))) THEN 'Not Reported' ELSE SUBJ_RACE END)

(CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_ETHNICITY), '')), LOWER('Choose One'))) THEN 'Not Reported' WHEN ((SUBJ_ETHNICITY IS NULL) OR (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJ_ETHNICITY), '')), LOWER('Not Reported')))) THEN 'Not Reported' ELSE SUBJ_ETHNICITY END)

(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)
((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID) = in3.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID) = in3.SUBJECT_ID))
((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID) = in4.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID) = in4.SUBJECT_ID))

((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID, in4.STUDY_ID) = in5.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID, in4.SUBJECT_ID) = in5.SUBJECT_ID))

((coalesce(in0.STUDY_ID, in1.STUDY_ID, in2.STUDY_ID, in3.STUDY_ID, in4.STUDY_ID, in5.STUDY_ID) = in6.STUDY_ID) AND (coalesce(in0.SUBJECT_ID, in1.SUBJECT_ID, in2.SUBJECT_ID, in3.SUBJECT_ID, in4.SUBJECT_ID, in5.SUBJECT_ID) = in6.SUBJECT_ID))
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.STUDY_ID END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.STUDY_ID = in1.STUDY_ID) AND (in0.SUBJECT_ID = in1.SUBJECT_ID)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.SUBJECT_ID END)

condition.expression: ((((((LENGTH(SUBJECT_ID)) = 8) AND ((NOT (STUDY_ID = 'C5041010')) OR (STUDY_ID IS NULL))) AND ((LENGTH(CAST((REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBJECT_ID, '\\d*')) AS STRING))) > 0)) AND (NOT ((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE (CONCAT(LOWER('0'), '%'))))) AND (NOT ((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE (CONCAT(LOWER('999'), '%')))))
